## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and Dimmo to discuss content strategy, performance metrics, and technical updates.](https://fathom.video/share/YvM7-zanZcF8z3G_u6SF4-yzQ453xfnd?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content production is on track with 69 articles published, aiming for 80-90 by next meeting](https://fathom.video/share/YvM7-zanZcF8z3G_u6SF4-yzQ453xfnd?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)
  - [Significant jump in impressions (18k/day) but clicks haven't increased proportionally](https://fathom.video/share/YvM7-zanZcF8z3G_u6SF4-yzQ453xfnd?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)
  - [Exploring enhancement of 20-30 product pages to test impact on direct traffic](https://fathom.video/share/YvM7-zanZcF8z3G_u6SF4-yzQ453xfnd?tab=summary&timestamp=389.0)
  - [Planning to create new subfolders for 'features' and 'alternatives' content](https://fathom.video/share/YvM7-zanZcF8z3G_u6SF4-yzQ453xfnd?tab=summary&timestamp=1069.0)

## Topics

### Content Production Progress

  - [69 articles published to date, 9 from current week](https://fathom.video/share/YvM7-zanZcF8z3G_u6SF4-yzQ453xfnd?tab=summary&timestamp=123.0)
  - [Breakdown: 11 best use case, 37 features, 25 alternatives](https://fathom.video/share/YvM7-zanZcF8z3G_u6SF4-yzQ453xfnd?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
  - [On track to reach 80-90 articles by next meeting](https://fathom.video/share/YvM7-zanZcF8z3G_u6SF4-yzQ453xfnd?tab=summary&timestamp=130.0)
  - [Planning 12-15 more alternative articles for specific tools](https://fathom.video/share/YvM7-zanZcF8z3G_u6SF4-yzQ453xfnd?tab=summary&timestamp=185.0)

### Performance Metrics

  - [Impressions increased from 500k to 18k/day](https://fathom.video/share/YvM7-zanZcF8z3G_u6SF4-yzQ453xfnd?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)
  - [Clicks haven't grown proportionally: 1 click (week 1) to 13 clicks (week 4)](https://fathom.video/share/YvM7-zanZcF8z3G_u6SF4-yzQ453xfnd?tab=summary&timestamp=253.0)
  - [Specific article performance:](https://fathom.video/share/YvM7-zanZcF8z3G_u6SF4-yzQ453xfnd?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)
      - [Channel sales management: 3 clicks](https://fathom.video/share/YvM7-zanZcF8z3G_u6SF4-yzQ453xfnd?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
      - [Ad management software: 4 clicks](https://fathom.video/share/YvM7-zanZcF8z3G_u6SF4-yzQ453xfnd?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
      - [Some articles lost clicks week-over-week despite stable impressions/positions](https://fathom.video/share/YvM7-zanZcF8z3G_u6SF4-yzQ453xfnd?tab=summary&timestamp=315.0)

### Product Page Enhancement Strategy

  - [Considering enhancing 20-30 product pages to test impact](https://fathom.video/share/YvM7-zanZcF8z3G_u6SF4-yzQ453xfnd?tab=summary&timestamp=389.0)
  - [Focus on companies with weaker SEO presence for better ranking potential](https://fathom.video/share/YvM7-zanZcF8z3G_u6SF4-yzQ453xfnd?tab=summary&timestamp=449.0)
  - [Prateek to research and select 20-30 products from the 130 pre-selected options](https://fathom.video/share/YvM7-zanZcF8z3G_u6SF4-yzQ453xfnd?tab=summary&timestamp=611.0)
  - [Troy shared ChatGPT prompt for generating enhanced product page content](https://fathom.video/share/YvM7-zanZcF8z3G_u6SF4-yzQ453xfnd?tab=summary&timestamp=638.0)

### Technical Updates

  - [Backend database migration in progress](https://fathom.video/share/YvM7-zanZcF8z3G_u6SF4-yzQ453xfnd?tab=summary&timestamp=897.0)
  - [No changes to URL structures or infrastructure planned](https://fathom.video/share/YvM7-zanZcF8z3G_u6SF4-yzQ453xfnd?tab=summary&timestamp=898.0)
  - [New author profiles to be created post-migration](https://fathom.video/share/YvM7-zanZcF8z3G_u6SF4-yzQ453xfnd?tab=summary&timestamp=876.0)

### Content Organization

  - [Proposed new subfolder structure:](https://fathom.video/share/YvM7-zanZcF8z3G_u6SF4-yzQ453xfnd?tab=summary&timestamp=1057.0)
    1.  dimmo.ai/features/tool-name
    2.  dimmo.ai/blog/features/tool-name
  - [Similar structure for 'alternatives' content](https://fathom.video/share/YvM7-zanZcF8z3G_u6SF4-yzQ453xfnd?tab=summary&timestamp=1069.0)
  - [Will require migration of existing content and 301 redirects](https://fathom.video/share/YvM7-zanZcF8z3G_u6SF4-yzQ453xfnd?tab=summary&timestamp=1371.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Prateek to finish 15 alternative articles this week](https://fathom.video/share/YvM7-zanZcF8z3G_u6SF4-yzQ453xfnd?tab=summary&timestamp=841.0)
  - [Prateek to research and select 20-30 products for enhanced pages](https://fathom.video/share/YvM7-zanZcF8z3G_u6SF4-yzQ453xfnd?tab=summary&timestamp=611.0)
  - [Prateek to prepare content samples for enhanced product pages](https://fathom.video/share/YvM7-zanZcF8z3G_u6SF4-yzQ453xfnd?tab=summary&timestamp=811.0)
  - [Lucas to create new subfolders for 'features' and 'alternatives'](https://fathom.video/share/YvM7-zanZcF8z3G_u6SF4-yzQ453xfnd?tab=summary&timestamp=1165.0)
  - [Lucas to migrate existing content to new structure and set up 301 redirects](https://fathom.video/share/YvM7-zanZcF8z3G_u6SF4-yzQ453xfnd?tab=summary&timestamp=1371.0)
  - [Lucas to provide Loom video on accessing new subfolders for content publishing](https://fathom.video/share/YvM7-zanZcF8z3G_u6SF4-yzQ453xfnd?tab=summary&timestamp=1292.0)
  - [Troy to double-check with Lucas about any potential URL changes during migration](https://fathom.video/share/YvM7-zanZcF8z3G_u6SF4-yzQ453xfnd?tab=summary&timestamp=984.0)
  - [Troy to update Prateek on author profile creation post-migration](https://fathom.video/share/YvM7-zanZcF8z3G_u6SF4-yzQ453xfnd?tab=summary&timestamp=876.0)
